name: Pit of Evil
short_description: Barry and his friends Arlene and Nellie decide to visit the Pit of Evil, the place where they lost their friend Fynn. While spending the night in a tent, things take an unexpected turn. The group gets seperated, while Barry suffers the same fate as Fynn, falling into the Pit of Evil.
detailed_description:
This game was re-released in October 2019 with Version 2.0. We increased the story and dialogue from 15.000 to 40.000 words and added alot more content to the game.

Update

Please notice: game was last updated to Version 2.0.2 on 25th October 2019.

Check out the new demo

The demo includes the first chapter of the game, the savefiles are fully compatible with the full version.

Main Characters

Story

Barry and his friends Arlene and Nellie decide to visit the Pit of Evil, the place where they lost their friend Fynn. While spending the night in a tent, things take an unexpected turn. The group gets seperated, while Barry suffers the same fate as Fynn, falling into the Pit of Evil.

Features

  • Twisted Story with mystery elements
  • Characters that hold deep connections to each other
  • Fast-Paced ATB System (Active Time Battle)
  • On map encounters (Chrono Engine)
  • Dungeons using puzzle elements
  • Dramatic cut-scenes, including flashbacks
  • Challenging boss fights
  • Interactive world map and journal system
